leadText: The Pink Bottle (Japanese: ピンクボトル Pink Bottle) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Pink Bottle serves no practical purpose other than to decorate the player 's picnic.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A go-to bottle widely used for drinks at picnics. Its simple design and portability make it popular among all sorts of people.
